warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
5x3 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 5 @ 55 + 65%
03:00 3 @ 75%
HOLD 5 Sets
06:00 3 @ 85%
09:00 3 @ 85%
12:00 3 @ 85%
15:00 3 @ 85%
18:00 3 @ 85%

metcon.name: Running from Jerks
metcon.description:
BUY IN: 1,000M Run
then 12-9-6
2 x DB Hang Clean & Jerk
Burpee over Dumbell

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
Max Reps (aim to keep the same reps throughout each set)
Aim for 1 more rep than last week

hypertrophy.reasoning: Bench press and DB jerks dominate anterior chain; accessory work targets posterior chain and arm health without competing for recovery.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 5 by 3 at 85 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Running from Jerks. Workout: 2 x DB Hang Clean & Jerk, Burpee over Dumbell. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, back hypertrophy, triceps.
